title: Decoy
writer: Philipp Lothar Mayring, Ludwig von Wohl
actors: Jakob Tiedtke, Viktor de Kowa, Jessie Vihrog
plot: Delia Donovan is the decoy and works for a pair of jewel thieves. Her job is to seduce Viktor, who has in his possession a necklace of priceless emeralds, which he is bringing from Turkey to Marseille for his father. The criminals...
